circle2の方をいじる
SimulateVelの中が具体的なシミュレーション


Indicate the algorithm, scenario, visualization option, number of iterations, coordination factor, type of neighbors considered in the politeness computation, number of neighbors considered in the politeness computation, and whether or not to use a following behavior.

Algorithm:
 1.- ORCA
 2.- C-Nav
Scenarios:
 1.- Crowd
 2.- Circle
 3.- Bidirectional
 4.- PerpCrossing
 5.- Congested
 6.- Crossing
 7.- Deadlock
 8.- Blocks
 9.- Line
Visualization:
 0.-Off
 1.-On

Number of iterations

Coordination Factor

Type of neighbors considered for politeness (1: all; 0: in front)

 Number of neighbors considered in the politeness factor

 Following behavior (0: disabled; 1: enabled)
